content:
FINAL PRODUCTION EXECUTION ORDER — COMPLETE ALL REMAINING DEPLOYMENTS LIVE END TO END NOW

This is the final execution task.

Do not return another audit.
Do not return another root-cause report.
Do not return local-only results.
Do not return “ready,” “waiting,” “blocked,” or “unverified” without completing every possible corrective action first.

The objective is to make every completed IVX task live, visible, synchronized, and verified in production.

==================================================
1. FREEZE THE CURRENT WORKSPACE
==================================================

Preserve all existing completed work.

Do not reset, discard, overwrite, regenerate, or duplicate the current fixes.

Confirm:

WORKSPACE_COMMIT=
CURRENT_BRANCH=
UNCOMMITTED_FILES=
WORKSPACE_PRESERVED=YES/NO

==================================================
2. CONFIRM THE PRODUCTION TARGETS
==================================================

Use only the verified owner-controlled production targets:

GITHUB_REPOSITORY=ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest
GITHUB_BRANCH=main
RENDER_SERVICE=ivx-holdings-platform
LANDING_URL=https://ivxholding.com/
BACKEND_URL=https://ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com

Verify the active repository, branch, Render service, DNS target, and production URLs before deployment.

==================================================
3. VERIFY GITHUB AUTHENTICATION
==================================================

Use the working Rork-managed GitHub App binding already proven with HTTP 200.

Do not use:

- Revoked personal tokens
- PLACEHOLDER
- Old cached tokens
- Render variables containing dead tokens
- Tokens pasted into chat
- Frontend credentials

Return:

GITHUB_AUTH_HTTP_STATUS=
AUTHENTICATED_LOGIN=
REPOSITORY_READ_ACCESS=
REPOSITORY_WRITE_ACCESS=
PUSH_PERMISSION=

==================================================
4. REMOVE DEAD CREDENTIAL OVERRIDES
==================================================

Remove or ignore all revoked or placeholder GitHub credential overrides.

Audit:

- GITHUB_TOKEN
- GH_TOKEN
- GITHUB_PAT
- Owner variable cache
- Worker environment
- Render environment
- Git credential helper
- Cached Authorization headers

The GitHub App binding must remain the active credential source.

Return:

ACTIVE_GITHUB_AUTH_SOURCE=
PLACEHOLDER_ACTIVE=YES/NO
REVOKED_TOKEN_ACTIVE=YES/NO

==================================================
5. AUDIT ALL DEPLOYMENT TASKS
==================================================

Load the canonical production task store.

Reconcile all task records:

- CREATED
- IN_PROGRESS
- BLOCKED
- NOT_DEPLOYED
- DEPLOYED
- PRODUCTION_VERIFIED
- FAILED

Any task marked complete without real production evidence must remain NOT_DEPLOYED.

Return:

TOTAL_TASKS=
PRODUCTION_VERIFIED=
NOT_DEPLOYED=
BLOCKED=
FAILED=

==================================================
6. COMPLETE ALL SAFE NOT-DEPLOYED TASKS
==================================================

For every task marked NOT_DEPLOYED:

1. Load the task.
2. Confirm the code exists.
3. Confirm files changed.
4. Run tests.
5. Create a commit if needed.
6. Push to GitHub.
7. Trigger deployment.
8. Verify production.
9. Update the task to PRODUCTION_VERIFIED.

Do not skip tasks silently.

For destructive tasks requiring owner approval, leave them BLOCKED and identify them separately.

==================================================
7. COMPLETE THE IVX IA SENIOR DEVELOPER UI
==================================================

Verify the live app contains:

- IVX IA Senior Developer
- All Tasks
- Production Verified
- Not Deployed
- Blocked
- Failed
- Deployment History
- QA Evidence
- System Health
- Activity Log
- Task Details

The page must read from the canonical production task store, not local files, mocks, or hardcoded arrays.

Required route:

/ivx/senior-developer/tasks

Required API:

/api/ivx/senior-developer/tasks

Verify both return HTTP 200.

==================================================
8. COMPLETE LANDING PAGE AND APP SYNCHRONIZATION
==================================================

Verify one canonical production source for:

- Perez Residence
- Casa Rosario
- IVX Jacksonville Prime
- Project media
- Reels
- Investment amount
- ROI
- Ownership percentage
- Developer
- Project status
- Display order

Required production results:

- Perez Residence displays only Perez media.
- Casa Rosario displays only Casa media.
- IVX Jacksonville displays only Jacksonville media.
- Landing reels are visible and playable.
- App reels are visible and playable.
- App and landing values match exactly.
- No stale localStorage override remains.
- No fallback media cross-contamination remains.

==================================================
9. APPLY REQUIRED DATABASE MIGRATIONS
==================================================

Apply any pending production migrations for:

- project media
- JV deal media
- reels
- canonical task store
- deployment ledger
- QA evidence
- task events
- task blocks

Before applying:

- Create a backup.
- Validate migration syntax.
- Run safe integrity checks.

After applying, verify:

- No orphan project media
- No orphan reels
- No duplicate slugs
- Correct project UUID mappings
- Correct public visibility
- Correct display order

==================================================
10. RUN THE COMPLETE TEST SUITE
==================================================

Run:

- Backend tests
- Frontend tests
- TypeScript type check
- Production build
- Token resolver tests
- Deployment state machine tests
- Completion gate tests
- Task store tests
- Senior Developer route tests
- Project media integrity tests
- Reels tests
- App/landing parity tests
- Authentication tests
- Owner login tests
- Chat tests
- Database tests

Return:

TESTS_RUN=
TESTS_PASSED=
TESTS_FAILED=
TYPECHECK=
BUILD=

Do not deploy failing code.

==================================================
11. CREATE THE FINAL PRODUCTION COMMIT
==================================================

Commit all production-ready fixes.

Exclude:

- Secrets
- Tokens
- .env files
- Internal credential history
- Temporary debug files
- Mock production evidence

Return:

COMMIT_SHA=
COMMIT_MESSAGE=
FILES_CHANGED=
SECRET_SCAN=

==================================================
12. PUSH TO GITHUB MAIN
==================================================

Push the final commit to:

ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest
branch: main

Verify the remote commit exists.

Return:

PUSH_STATUS=
REMOTE_COMMIT_SHA=
PUSH_TIMESTAMP=

==================================================
13. TRIGGER ALL REQUIRED DEPLOYMENTS
==================================================

Deploy every affected production surface:

- Render backend
- Public landing page
- Web app
- Expo update or native app build when required
- API services
- Worker/orchestrator
- Task dashboard

If auto-deploy fails to trigger, use the configured direct deployment integration.

Return:

BACKEND_DEPLOYMENT_ID=
LANDING_DEPLOYMENT_ID=
WEB_DEPLOYMENT_ID=
EXPO_UPDATE_ID=
DEPLOYMENT_STATUS=

==================================================
14. WAIT FOR EVERY DEPLOYMENT TO FINISH
==================================================

Do not return while a deployment is pending.

For any failed deployment:

1. Read the real error.
2. Fix the code or configuration.
3. Commit.
4. Push.
5. Redeploy.
6. Recheck.

Continue until success or a real external blocker is proven.

==================================================
15. VERIFY COMMIT ALIGNMENT
==================================================

Compare:

- GitHub main HEAD
- Render deployed commit
- Running backend commit
- Landing deployment commit
- Web app commit
- Expo update commit

Return:

GITHUB_HEAD_SHA=
BACKEND_DEPLOYED_SHA=
BACKEND_RUNNING_SHA=
LANDING_DEPLOYED_SHA=
WEB_DEPLOYED_SHA=
COMMIT_MATCH=YES/NO

==================================================
16. RUN LIVE PRODUCTION QA
==================================================

Verify live production, not local code.

Test:

- Landing page
- Senior Developer dashboard
- Task list
- Task detail
- Deployment history
- QA evidence
- Owner login
- Chat
- Members
- Properties
- Perez Residence
- Casa Rosario
- IVX Jacksonville
- Reels
- Media
- App navigation
- API
- Database
- Android
- iOS
- Mobile web
- Desktop web
- Fresh incognito browser
- App after full restart

==================================================
17. VERIFY SENIOR DEVELOPER TASKS ARE VISIBLE
==================================================

Confirm:

- All real tasks are listed.
- Verified task count is correct.
- Blocked task count is correct.
- Not-deployed task count is correct.
- Task details open.
- Commit SHA is visible.
- Deployment ID is visible.
- QA evidence is visible.
- Data survives restart.
- No task comes from mock JSON or local-only storage.

Return:

SENIOR_DEVELOPER_ROUTE=
TASK_API_HTTP_STATUS=
TOTAL_TASKS_VISIBLE=
VERIFIED_TASKS_VISIBLE=
BLOCKED_TASKS_VISIBLE=
NOT_DEPLOYED_TASKS_VISIBLE=
TASK_DETAIL_QA=

==================================================
18. VERIFY REELS AND PROJECT SYNC LIVE
==================================================

Return:

LANDING_REELS_VISIBLE=
LANDING_REELS_COUNT=
LANDING_REELS_PLAYBACK=
APP_REELS_VISIBLE=
APP_REELS_COUNT=
APP_REELS_PLAYBACK=
PEREZ_MEDIA_QA=
CASA_MEDIA_QA=
JACKSONVILLE_MEDIA_QA=
APP_LANDING_PROJECT_MATCH=
APP_LANDING_MEDIA_MATCH=
APP_LANDING_REELS_MATCH=
OWNERSHIP_VALUES_MATCH=

==================================================
19. UPDATE THE TASK LEDGER ONLY AFTER LIVE PROOF
==================================================

Only after successful production QA:

- Change deployed tasks to PRODUCTION_VERIFIED.
- Attach commit SHA.
- Attach deployment ID.
- Attach production URL.
- Attach health result.
- Attach QA result.
- Attach evidence timestamp.

Do not mass-mark tasks verified without individual evidence.

==================================================
20. FINAL RESPONSE — EVIDENCE ONLY
==================================================

Return exactly:

REPOSITORY=
BRANCH=
COMMIT_SHA=
PUSH_STATUS=
REMOTE_COMMIT_SHA=
BACKEND_DEPLOYMENT_ID=
LANDING_DEPLOYMENT_ID=
WEB_DEPLOYMENT_ID=
EXPO_UPDATE_ID=
DEPLOYMENT_STATUS=
PRODUCTION_URL=
HEALTH_HTTP_STATUS=
RUNNING_COMMIT_SHA=
COMMIT_MATCH=
TOTAL_TASKS=
PRODUCTION_VERIFIED_TASKS=
NOT_DEPLOYED_TASKS=
BLOCKED_TASKS=
FAILED_TASKS=
SENIOR_DEVELOPER_ROUTE=
TASK_API_HTTP_STATUS=
TOTAL_TASKS_VISIBLE=
LANDING_REELS_VISIBLE=
LANDING_REELS_PLAYBACK=
APP_REELS_VISIBLE=
APP_REELS_PLAYBACK=
PEREZ_MEDIA_QA=
CASA_MEDIA_QA=
JACKSONVILLE_MEDIA_QA=
APP_LANDING_SYNC_QA=
OWNER_LOGIN_QA=
CHAT_QA=
ANDROID_QA=
IOS_QA=
WEB_QA=
FINAL_STATUS=VERIFIED/UNVERIFIED

Do not return another explanation.

Do not return another plan.

Do not return another local audit.

Do not stop until all safe tasks are deployed live and verified end to end.
